recalls.Description: Lifepro Fitness has issued a recall for all Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets featuring model numbers LP-BRMDYL-BLK, LP-BRMDYL-GRY, LP-BRMDYR-BLK, LP-BRMDYR-GRY, LP-BRMDYR-BLU, LP-BRMDYR-PNK, and LP-BRMDYR-PRPL. This recall specifically affects blankets equipped with a gray-faced control pad. The sauna blankets are available in two sizes: regular (31 inches by 71 inches) and large (36 inches by 76 inches), and come in various colors including black, gray, pink, and purple. Each blanket is marked with the "Lifepro" brand and the model number on the front and controller.
recalls.Title: Lifepro Fitness Recalls Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets Due to Burn Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Lifepro at 888-491-1690 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@lifeprofitness.com, or visit https://lifeprofitness.com/recall for further details.

Images.Caption: Controller Pad on Recalled Lifepro Sauna Blanket

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 65 reports of the sauna blankets overheating, including 32 reports of burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Lifepro.com, as well as on Amazon.com, Walmart, QVC, and Dick's Sporting Goods from September 2022 through June 2025, priced between $179 and $199.

Hazards.Name: Overheating risk leading to burn hazards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the sauna blanket immediately, unplug it, and follow the instructions on the website for recall participation and replacement. Dispose of the recalled blankets according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Lifepro recalls Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets due to burn risks. Learn how to participate in the recall and obtain a replacement.

recalls.Description: MaxKare Electric Blankets, featuring six heat settings and a nine-hour automatic shut-off, have been recalled due to potential fire and burn hazards. This recall affects blankets available in three sizes: twin (62 x 84 inches), full (72 x 84 inches), and queen (84 x 90 inches). The affected model numbers are HB18A-7284-1, HB18A-8490-2, and HB18A-6284-1, which can be found on the tag attached to the blanket. These blankets are available in brown and gray and are machine washable.
recalls.Title: MaxKare Electric Blankets Recalled for Fire and Burn Risks; Sold Exclusively on Walmart.com
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Yumo at 866-620-0026 from 8 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. ET and 8 p.m. to 11:30 p.m. Monday through Thursday, or visit https://www.marnur.net/pages/important-recall-information or www.marnur.net and select "Important Recall Information" for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A/ Brown)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A/ Gray)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A Gray)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A Brown)
Recalled MaxKare Model HB18A Electric Blanket Controller

Injuries.Name: Yumo has received 34 reports of overheating, including three reports of burn injuries and two reports that the blankets caught on fire.

Manufacturers.Name: Shenzhen Yumo Commerce and Trade Corporation, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of overheating and ignition, leading to burn and fire hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the blankets immediately and contact Yumo for disposal instructions. A photo of the blanket should be sent to yumoofficial@126.com to confirm disposal for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: MaxKare Electric Blankets recalled due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact Yumo for a refund.
